commit.message: HDFS-16705. RBF supports healthMonitor timeout configurable and caching NN and client proxy in NamenodeHeartbeatService (#4662)

verification.payload:
tree 06058203159af4ec2c464503b7b936733c4aeb34
parent eff3b8c59a8326af830e2d587f467bbf8602fd39
author xuzq <15040255127@163.com> 1660596916 +0800
committer GitHub <noreply@github.com> 1660596916 -0700

HDFS-16705. RBF supports healthMonitor timeout configurable and caching NN and client proxy in NamenodeHeartbeatService (#4662)

files.patch:
@@ -422,6 +422,14 @@
     </description>
   </property>
 
+  <property>
+    <name>dfs.federation.router.health.monitor.timeout</name>
+    <value>30s</value>
+    <description>
+      Time out for Router to obtain HAServiceStatus from NameNode.
+    </description>
+  </property>
+
   <property>
     <name>dfs.federation.router.heartbeat-state.interval</name>
     <value>5s</value>
